name: Builderment
short_description: Builderment is a casual factory builder, where you are sent to far away planets to keep Earth going with fresh resources. Establish your base, then mine, build, transport, and ultimately design an automated operation that will save your home one shipment at a time!
detailed_description:
After Earth ran out of resources, it started out daring explorers - like yourself - to faraway planets to mine, build, and transport back raw materials to save it, one shipment at a time!



Builderment is all about automation! Starting with the simplest of buildings and a handy-dandy teleporter, you can build a precisely engineered network that strip-mines the planet with unparalleled efficiency - or create a conveyor belt hell that wakes engineers up in the middle of the night. The choice is yours!

Mine, Build, Transport


Every factory starts with the simplest of extractors, conveyor belts, and machines to convert wood, iron, copper, and dozens of other raw materials into something you can send back home. But that's just the start: With every shipment, you get the opportunity to research more items that will allow you to exploit the planet faster, more efficiently, and give you even more ways to construct the ultimate conveyor belt (playing with splitters is always fun!)

Plan, Power, Decorate


To properly complete your mission, you'll also have to extract coal and uranium: The more power in the system, the faster the extraction goes. Your coal and nuclear plants will keep the production going ever faster. But remember: There's more to a happy factory than just machines and reactors! Decorate it with trees, statues, and other attractive features to make strip-mining fun and attractive!

Join, Share, Experiment


Builderment is built for the community. Share blueprints of your favorite or most nightmarish sections to show off (or scare your engineer friends), download designs created by other players, or join our Discord to engage with a vibrant community of creators and aspiring planetary factory designers!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Simplified Chinese
